records.question: Which universities named University of Arizona in the United States of America have at most 36429 students, at least 52.0% female students, a student-staff ratio exactly 12.7, exactly 8% international students, and a ranking score exactly 235.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_year.num_students <= 36429 AND university_year.pct_female_students >= 52.0 AND university_year.student_staff_ratio = 12.7 AND university.university_name = 'University of Arizona' AND country.country_name = 'United States of America' AND university_year.pct_international_students = 8 AND university_ranking_year.score = 235.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u.id
FROM university u
JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
JOIN university_year uy ON u.id = uy.university_id
JOIN university_ranking_year ur ON u.id = ur.university_id
WHERE u.university_name = 'University of Arizona'
  AND c.country_name = 'United States of America'
  AND uy.num_students <= 36429
  AND uy.pct_female_students >= 52.0
  AND uy.student_staff_ratio = 12.7
  AND uy.pct_international_students = 8
  AND ur.score = 235.0

records.question: Which universities that have an associated country, university ranking year, and university year record have a student-staff ratio exactly equal to 15.3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university

JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_year.student_staff_ratio = 15.3

JOIN university_year uy ON u.id = uy.university_id
WHERE u.country_id IS NOT NULL
  AND uy.student_staff_ratio = 15.3

records.question: Which University of Washington campuses have exactly 53.0% female students, exactly 13% international students, a student-staff ratio of exactly 11.8, no more than 44020 students in years up to 2013, and a 2005 ranking score of exactly 74.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university.university_name = 'University of Washington' AND university_year.pct_female_students = 53.0 AND university_ranking_year.year = 2005 AND university_ranking_year.score = 74.0 AND university_year.num_students <= 44020 AND university_year.pct_international_students = 13 AND university_year.student_staff_ratio = 11.8 AND university_year.year <= 2013
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u.id
FROM university u
JOIN university_year uy ON u.id = uy.university_id
JOIN university_ranking_year ury ON u.id = ury.university_id
JOIN ranking_criteria rc ON ury.ranking_criteria_id = rc.id
JOIN ranking_system rs ON rc.ranking_system_id = rs.id
WHERE u.university_name LIKE 'University of Washington%'
  AND uy.pct_female_students = 53.0
  AND uy.pct_international_students = 13
  AND uy.student_staff_ratio = 11.8
  AND uy.year <= 2013
GROUP BY u.id
HAVING MAX(uy.num_students) <= 44020
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN ury.year = 2005 AND ury.score = 74.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0

JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
